No blocking issues found.

I verified both guards in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts`:
- Queue retry guard now atomically requeues only when `status='running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL` (both main retry path and inline recovery path).
- Inline cancel-recovery guard handles the `running + cancel_requested_at` race and avoids emitting `deployment_retry_scheduled` when cancellation wins.

I also verified the new inline race coverage in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.test.ts` (the `inlineRecoverCancelRace` case), and ran the worker test suite (`pnpm test` in `packages/worker`) — all tests passed, including `workspace-deployment-runner`.
